assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- A. Golden Path A1: initializeTariffState includes baseline tariffs
assertionResults.title: A1: initializeTariffState includes baseline tariffs

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- A. Golden Path A2: initializeTariffState includes trade agreements
assertionResults.title: A2: initializeTariffState includes trade agreements

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- A. Golden Path A3: calculateTariff for Asia -> North America (known route with baseline tariff)
assertionResults.title: A3: calculateTariff for Asia -> North America (known route with baseline tariff)

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- A. Golden Path A4: calculateTotalTariffBurden computes sum and most expensive route
assertionResults.title: A4: calculateTotalTariffBurden computes sum and most expensive route

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B1: same-region tariff should have rate 0 or very low (no baseline tariff defined)
assertionResults.title: B1: same-region tariff should have rate 0 or very low (no baseline tariff defined)

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B2: empty orders burden returns zeroes
assertionResults.title: B2: empty orders burden returns zeroes

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B3: forecastTariffs returns forecasted rates with decreasing confidence
assertionResults.title: B3: forecastTariffs returns forecasted rates with decreasing confidence

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B4: suggestMitigationStrategies returns at least 2 strategies
assertionResults.title: B4: suggestMitigationStrategies returns at least 2 strategies

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B5: trade agreements reduce adjusted rate below base rate
assertionResults.title: B5: trade agreements reduce adjusted rate below base rate

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B6: expired tariffs are removed by processRoundEvents
assertionResults.title: B6: expired tariffs are removed by processRoundEvents

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B7: processRoundEvents with fresh state returns structured result
assertionResults.title: B7: processRoundEvents with fresh state returns structured result

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B8: tariff calculation with zero material cost yields zero tariff amount
assertionResults.title: B8: tariff calculation with zero material cost yields zero tariff amount

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B9: tariff on route with no baseline tariff returns zero rate
assertionResults.title: B9: tariff on route with no baseline tariff returns zero rate

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B10: forecastTariffs with forecastRounds=1 returns single entry
assertionResults.title: B10: forecastTariffs with forecastRounds=1 returns single entry

assertionResults.fullName: TariffEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B11: mitigation strategies for no-tariff route still return alternatives
assertionResults.title: B11: mitigation strategies for no-tariff route still return alternatives
